tips_en: Start with MemEye, as its taxonomy and benchmark for visual memory bottlenecks provide a diagnostic foundation for understanding the limitations of multi-turn agents and long-horizon world models. Together, the papers form a coherent agentic pipeline: SDAR advances multi-turn decision-making training, MemEye exposes the visual memory constraints such agents face, and SANA-WM offers an efficient, controllable generative substrate for embodied environments.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 MemEye，其视觉记忆分类体系与评测结果揭示了多轮智能体和长时程世界模型面临的基础瓶颈。三篇论文形成有机整体：SDAR 改进多轮智能体的策略训练，MemEye 诊断其视觉记忆短板，而 SANA-WM 为具身交互提供了高效可控的视觉世界模拟。
